ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "estimated_effort" REAL /* Estimated effort required for the project */,
  "actual_effort" REAL /* Actual effort required for the project */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., 'In Planning', 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project characteristic */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the characteristic belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., team experience, project complexity) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic (e.g., 4, 5) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the characteristic (e.g., 'Team Experience', 'Project Complexity') */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the characteristic for more accurate estimation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_characteristics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cocomo_ii_model" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., a, b, c) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., 'Person-Months', 'USD') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the estimate belongs to */,
  "effort" REAL /* Estimated effort required for the project */,
  "cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the estimate was created */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Estimation methodology used (e.g., 'COCOMO II', 'PERT') */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuals" (
  "actual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the actual belongs to */,
  "effort" REAL /* Actual effort required for the project */,
  "cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the actual was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the actual effort and cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuals_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'Project Manager', 'Developer') */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the project is assigned to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project assigned to the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., 'Project Manager', 'Developer') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., 'Estimation Report', 'Progress Report') */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., 'PDF', 'Excel') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the analytics result belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., effort, cost) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics result was created */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of the analysis (e.g., 'Effort Analysis', 'Cost Analysis') */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for analysis (e.g., 'Estimates', 'Actuals') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
